pageDescription: Contact Apex Capital Group regarding investment inquiries, portfolio matters, or institutional partnership opportunities.
heading: Get in Touch.
subHeading: Direct inquiries are reviewed by the relevant team and responded to within one business day.

form.heading: Send a Message

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Describe your inquiry. Include relevant context — deal size, sector, timeline — as applicable.

form.confirmationText: You will receive an email confirmation of receipt.
form.successMessage: Message received. We will be in touch shortly.
form.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
